creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
On Mon, Mar 21, 2011 at 03:20:16PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-RT-Authen-ExternalAuth,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/155750 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/155750

Yes, this port needs updating, but the supplied patch has a few
problems.  Please use the following instead:

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/p5-RT-Authen-ExternalAuth/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.7
diff -u -u -r1.7 Makefile
--- Makefile	16 Dec 2010 02:34:04 -0000	1.7
+++ Makefile	21 Mar 2011 21:59:09 -0000
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	RT-Authen-ExternalAuth
-PORTVERSION=	0.08
-PORTREVISION=	3
+DISTVERSION=	0.08_01
 CATEGORIES=	www net perl5
-MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN/../../authors/id/F/FA/FALCONE/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
 MAINTAINER=	m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/www/p5-RT-Authen-ExternalAuth/distinfo,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -u -r1.3 distinfo
--- distinfo	19 Mar 2011 12:35:57 -0000	1.3
+++ distinfo	21 Mar 2011 21:59:09 -0000
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-SHA256 (RT-Authen-ExternalAuth-0.08.tar.gz) = 2d211e5425e6e6a63b163de3d1a510768a18dbe77f233834da6d8a6b4528b24a
-SIZE (RT-Authen-ExternalAuth-0.08.tar.gz) = 39386
+SHA256 (RT-Authen-ExternalAuth-0.08_01.tar.gz) = d8fb0223a0a9f6b7836e658433a61c34091a2665cf987ad5a2d2433312c03efb
+SIZE (RT-Authen-ExternalAuth-0.08_01.tar.gz) = 53393
 SHA256 (RT-Authen-ExternalAuth-0.05.tar.gz) = e4ef01558d874b438c4818c5de1a373b93b8c2d4abffe9b87f0b88807a93c47e
 SIZE (RT-Authen-ExternalAuth-0.05.tar.gz) = 34653
